name: linear-issue-management
description: File, triage, edit, and audit Linear issues through the GraphQL API with team/project/label discovery, duplicate search, mutually-exclusive label handling, and secret-safe auth.

interface.shortDescription: File, triage, edit, and audit Linear issues through the GraphQL API with team/project/label discovery, duplicate search, mutually-exclusive label handling, and secret-safe auth.
interface.longDescription: Discover exact team/project/label/state IDs and search for duplicates before executing one focused GraphQL mutation.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use Linear Issue Management safely.
